method: Manual review of pinned repository trees and the cited deterministic evidence; bands judge repo-level multi-agent readiness, not project maturity.

instruction_convergence.evidence_note: Root AGENTS.md provides commands, boundaries, topic reading, and one real scoped override.
instruction_convergence.unknown_note: Runtime loading of both instruction scopes is not statically provable.

task_workspace_isolation.evidence_note: Branch naming, monorepo boundaries, Docker, and a scoped QA worktree rule exist, but no root contract covers all parallel-task state.
task_workspace_isolation.unknown_note: Actual worktree, port, cache, and credential isolation remains unknown.

ownership_boundaries.evidence_note: CODEOWNERS is broad while AGENTS.md carries useful topic-specific boundaries and required reading.
ownership_boundaries.unknown_note: Reviewer availability and enforcement remain unknown.

shared_decision_context.evidence_note: The root map, design material, required-reading contracts, and Context Tree references form a discoverable shared context surface.
shared_decision_context.unknown_note: Freshness and actual consultation of external Context Tree material remain unknown.

repeatable_verification.evidence_note: Root and package commands, extensive tests, lockfiles, CI, and setup material provide a repeatable loop.
repeatable_verification.unknown_note: Pinned calibration does not execute the commands.

handoff_definition.evidence_note: Issue and pull-request templates plus contribution guidance cover acceptance and completion evidence.
handoff_definition.unknown_note: Real task and review quality remains unknown.
